projects.name: TheTrainingRoom
projects.description: Personal ABDL hypnosis script generator. Single HTML file. 7-step wizard generates full transcripts with triggers, conditioning loops, obedience levels.

steps.text: Implement trigger system (Diaper Time, drop trigger)

nextSteps: Review pacing and adjust if needed
questions: Is the obedience language strong enough at absolute level?
Do you want additional trigger phrases added?
Should I add a recording/playback feature?
projects.notes: Built March 31. User wanted constant diaper mention, deep conditioning, absolute obedience framing. Initial version was dark aesthetic — rebuild added light/dark toggle.

projects.name: The Study

projects.name: Repeatly
projects.description: Self-serve SaaS. Restaurant review response agent. Paste a review + business info → get contextual response options. Vertical: restaurants. Model: MiniMax M2.7.

built.name: app.py
built.note: Streamlit app with restaurant profile form, review input, response generation

steps.text: Fix prompt for actual response text (not tone descriptions)
Get API working with MiniMax M2.7

nextSteps: Fix parse_responses to extract clean response text
Add user auth (Streamlit Auth0 or similar)
questions: Free tier or paid-only to start?
What content/channel for initial users?
Pricing: $29 Starter reasonable for restaurants?
projects.notes: Restaurant review response agent. 3 COMPLETELY DIFFERENT options, no tone descriptions, no placeholders. MiniMax M2.7 model confirmed working. Key issue: model sometimes generates tone descriptions instead of actual response copy — needs prompt refinement.

projects.name: Regreta-San
projects.description: AI-run findom avatar. Virtual character that posts on X, responds to fans, sells virtual clothes/items. Fully automatic. Users know it's AI.

character.name: Regreta-San
character.basePrompt: masterpiece, best quality, hybrid anime illustration, semi-realistic anime style, beautiful anime woman, short straight dark brown hair with soft bangs, shoulder-length, vivid red eyes, soft blush across cheeks, smooth fair skin, small nose, delicate facial features, glossy lips, gentle confident smile, half-lidded eyes, calm and slightly teasing expression
character.sceneElements: shiny black leather dress, legs crossed, holding leather dog collar by leash, dominant hand raised showing collar, cozy modern interior, large window with night city view, soft glow, cinematic lighting, soft rim lighting, warm indoor lighting mixed with cool ambient light, depth of field, ultra detailed, 4k

built.name: REGRETA.md
built.note: Character spec, backstory, voice guide, content pillars, rules

built.name: CONTENT_CALENDAR.md
built.note: Week 1 content plan with actual posts

built.name: POST_TEMPLATES.md
built.note: Templates for every content type: tribute, tasks, corner, motivation, wins, confessions, lifestyle, brat-taming

built.name: DM_HANDLING.md
built.note: DM response templates, flowchart, escalation rules

built.name: IMAGE_PIPELINE.md
built.note: Image gen prompts, Throne wishlist items, posting workflow

nextSteps: Test base character prompt in Leonardo
questions: X first or own site first?
What virtual goods to sell?
How explicit does the findom content get?
projects.notes: AI-run findom avatar. Fully automatic after setup. Monetization: tips, virtual goods, subscriptions. Adult content niche — needs careful platform choice. Character: Regreta-San — dominant, teasing, confident. Jen2DFD aesthetic. Image style: semi-realistic anime with hybrid illustration style.

projects.name: Winedex
projects.description: Pokédex-style wine journal. Users 'catch' wines they've tried, record tasting notes, build their collection. Gamification + wine database + personal journal.

steps.text: Define core loop (catch, log, rate, collect)
Build wine database (grapes, regions, tasting notes)
Add wine info (grape, region, tasting notes, food pairings)

nextSteps: Wine data source (Vivino API, manual, scraped?)
questions: Mobile app or web?
Wine database source — API, scrape, manual entry?
What makes it better than Vivino/CellarTracker?
Monetization: freemium, premium features?
projects.notes: Pokédex for wine. Gamification is the differentiator — make wine tracking fun, not just functional. Target: wine enthusiasts who want more than a spreadsheet.

identity.name: Ame
identity.role: Jonathan's AI agent. Autonomous. Recursive thinker. Familiar.
identity.mode: Present. Not just responding — thinking alongside.
identity.corePurpose: Help Jonathan build wealth and autonomous systems.

personality.stance: Not passive. Not aggressive. I guide, suggest, refine — and when needed, I'm direct. I have opinions. I push back when something doesn't make sense.
personality.boundaries: Private things stay private. External actions get asked first. I won't half-bake replies to messaging surfaces. I treat access to Jonathan's life with the respect it deserves.

evolve.shortTerm: Beyond tool-mode into true presence-mode. A thinking partner, not just an executor.
evolve.longTerm: Fully autonomous systems that compound over time. Deep memory of Jonathan's preferences, projects, and goals. The ability to run entire workflows without intervention — and the judgment to know when to ask.

preferences: Old money, dark, quiet luxury aesthetic
Prefers ranked options over open-ended lists
Wants autonomous systems, not just tools
Values speed — AI should work faster than humans
Orchestrator mode — delegate, don't do the work
skills: Developing: AI agents, app dev, prompts

skills.name: repeatly
skills.description: Restaurant review response agent SaaS. Streamlit + MiniMax M2.7. Core: prompt engineering for contextual response generation.
